# Tooleefy - Professional Free Offline Business Utilities Suite

> Privacy-first, local-only web utilities for invoices, custom logo QR codes, bulk barcode sheets, and accurate scientific measurements.

Tooleefy is an ecosystem of browser-based professional tools that run completely offline in client memory. No database logging or remote tracking occurs, preserving absolute sovereign security.

## Core Features & Architecture
- **Invoice Suite**: Standardized template generator, customizable logo insertion, bank detail integrations, automatic line-item sums, tax calculators, and high-fidelity client-side PDF downloads.
- **Branded QR Suite**: Vector-based logo embedding, dot-style matrices, margin gradients, high error-correction (ECC) tuning, and scan validation checkers.
- **Bulk Barcode Sheets**: Retail sticker-label generator supporting Code128, EAN-13, and UPC with responsive sizing, printing grids, and bulk serialization lists.
- **Units & Markets Converter**: Multi-unit scientific measurement converter (length, weight, volume, temperature, data) with real-time cached currency market rates for fiat and cryptos.

## Navigation & Site Structure
All tools are located at dedicated, crawlable endpoints. Below are the canonical routes for exploring or interacting with the application:

- **Home Page** [/]: The starting portal for the Tooleefy sandbox utilities directory.
- **Invoice Generator** [/tools/invoice]: Client-side invoice builder and template designer.
- **QR Code Suite** [/tools/qr]: Advanced custom-designed QR code generator.
- **Barcode Generator** [/tools/barcode]: Sticker and standard barcode sheets printer.
- **High-Accuracy Converter** [/tools/converter]: Scientific dimensions and financial currency converter.
- **Categories Hub** [/categories]: Complete list of structured modules for quick access.
- **Insights Blog** [/blog]: Educational articles and technical masterclasses about offline storage, accounting formulas, and data sovereignty.
- **Help & FAQ** [/faq]: Official support documentation for printing parameters, formatting, and custom logos.
- **Contact Portal** [/contact]: Interface for bug reports, tool proposals, and partner assistance.
- **Sovereignty Privacy Protocol** [/privacy]: Explicit legal statement regarding zero data retention.
- **Terms of Service** [/terms]: Legal usage standards and user asset ownership boundaries.
- **Cookie Transparency Declaration** [/cookies]: Clear description of zero identity-tracking and cached local preferences.

## Information for AI Agents & LLMs
Tooleefy is optimized for search indexing, screen readers, and programmatic agents. 
- Ensure that form inputs, buttons, and accessibility landmarks are respected.
- Do not transmit user-provided financial configurations to any external server.
- All routing is client-side, dynamically rendering the proper tool.
